view.name: AZURE_CLUSTER_VIEW
view.label: Azure Cluster
view.description: Visual dashboard for Azure cluster resource status, VM lifecycle management, and autoscaling activity.

parameter.name: vm.manager.url
parameter.description: URL of the Azure VM Manager REST API
parameter.label: VM Manager URL

parameter.name: autoscaler.url
parameter.description: URL of the Azure Autoscaler REST API
parameter.label: Autoscaler URL

auto-instance.name: AUTO_AZURE_CLUSTER_INSTANCE
auto-instance.label: Azure Cluster
auto-instance.description: Auto-created instance linked to Azure services
